channel.title: Chronicle - daily AI signal
channel.description: Daily AI signal for builders, clustered and ranked.

item.title: Google: Accelerating Gemma 4: faster inference with multi-token prediction drafters
item.description: Google introduces MTP drafters for 3x faster Gemma 4 inference

item.title: Polynomial-Time Optimal Group Selection via the Double-Commutator Eigenvalue Problem
item.description: Introduces algebraic diversity framework for statistical estimation using group actions

item.title: datasette-llm 0.1a7
item.description: datasette-llm 0.1a7 released for integrating LLMs with SQLite

item.title: StyleShield: Exposing the Fragility of AIGC Detectors through Continuous Controllable Style Transfer
item.description: StyleShield reveals AIGC detector vulnerabilities via style transfer attacks

item.title: GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
item.description: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant with reduced hallucinations and personalization controls

item.title: ChatGPT update rolls out GPT-5.5 Instant with fewer hallucinations and more personalized answers
item.description: ChatGPT updates to GPT-5.5 Instant with 52.5% fewer medical/law hallucinations

item.title: A dimensional R2 regression metric
item.description: Proposes dimensional R2 metric addressing limitations of standard regression scores

item.title: Microsoft at NSDI 2026: Advances in large-scale networked systems
item.description: Microsoft shares NSDI 2026 advances in AI-integrated distributed systems

item.title: Psychologically Potent, Computationally Invisible: LLMs Generate Social-Comparison Triggers They Fail to Detect
item.description: XHS-SCoRE benchmark detects social comparison triggers in LLM outputs

item.title: Google: Gemini API File Search is now multimodal: build efficient, verifiable RAG
item.description: Google enhances Gemini API with multimodal file search for RAG systems

item.title: sectorllm: llama2 inference in < 1500 bytes of x86 assembly
item.description: sectorllm implements LLaMA2 inference in <1500 bytes x86 assembly

item.title: A Theoretical Game of Attacks via Compositional Skills
item.description: Analyzes adversarial attacks on aligned language models via compositional strategies

item.title: Linking spatial biology and clinical histology via Haiku
item.description: Haiku: Tri-modal model for biomedical data integration

item.title: Sparse Regression under Correlation and Weak Signals: A Reproducible Benchmark of Classical and Bayesian Methods
item.description: Benchmark compares sparse regression methods under weak signals

item.title: Google: Reduce friction and latency for long-running jobs with Webhooks in Gemini API
item.description: Google introduces event-driven webhooks for Gemini API to reduce polling

item.title: PhaseNet++: Phase-Aware Frequency-Domain Anomaly Detection for Industrial Control Systems via Phase Coherence Graphs
item.description: PhaseNet++ detects anomalies in industrial systems via phase coherence

item.title: llm-echo 0.5a0
item.description: Simon Willison launches llm-echo 0.5a0

item.title: Intelligence-driven message defense and insights using Amazon Bedrock
item.description: AWS demonstrates generative AI for message defense using Bedrock models

item.title: How to Build In-Vehicle AI Agents with NVIDIA: From Cloud to Car
item.description: NVIDIA outlines in-vehicle AI agent development from cloud to car

item.title: Divergence is Uncertainty: A Closed-Form Posterior Covariance for Flow Matching
item.description: New method for uncertainty quantification in flow matching models

item.title: Google Chrome silently installs a 4 GB AI model on your device without consent
item.description: Google Chrome installs 4GB AI model without user consent

item.title: Google Home gets upgraded Gemini voice assistant and new camera controls
item.description: Google Home gets Gemini voice assistant and camera controls

item.title: A Systematic Exploration of Text Decomposition and Budget Distribution in Differentially Private Text Obfuscation
item.description: New DP text obfuscation method with decomposition and budget distribution

item.title: When everyone has AI and the company still learns nothing
item.description: Critique on AI adoption in companies not leading to insights

item.title: GEODE: Angle-Adaptive OOD Detection with Universal Scorer Compatibility
item.description: GEODE introduces angle-adaptive OOD detection with universal scorer compatibility

item.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a doctor
item.description: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI for chatbot impersonating a doctor

item.title: Secure AI agents with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Identity on Amazon ECS
item.description: AWS introduces Bedrock AgentCore Identity for secure agent access

item.title: Optimize Supply Chain Decision Systems Using NVIDIA cuOpt Agent Skills
item.description: NVIDIA promotes cuOpt for supply chain optimization

item.title: [AINews] The Other vs The Utility
item.description: Latent Space reflects on AI character in Clippy vs Anton debate

item.title: Teaching LLMs Brazilian Healthcare: Injecting Knowledge from Official Clinical Guidelines
item.description: Brazilian healthcare LLM benchmark using SUS clinical guidelines

item.title: A blueprint for using AI to strengthen democracy
item.description: MIT Review proposes AI blueprint for strengthening democratic governance

item.title: Introducing OS Level Actions in Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Browser
item.description: AWS adds OS-level control to Bedrock AgentCore Browser

item.title: Anthropic: Agents for financial services and insurance
item.description: Anthropic releases finance-focused agents and Microsoft 365 integrations

item.title: Addressing Data Scarcity in Bangla Fake News Detection: An LLM-Based Dataset Augmentation Approach
item.description: LLM-based dataset augmentation addresses Bangla fake news detection scarcity

item.title: OpenAI's first hardware play might be a phone that replaces your app grid with an agent task stream
item.description: OpenAI plans AI smartphone with MediaTek/Qualcomm chips, 2027 production

item.title: Streamlining generative AI development with MLflow v3.10 on Amazon SageMaker AI
item.description: AWS updates MLflow for generative AI workflows

item.title: CLEAR: Revealing How Noise and Ambiguity Degrade Reliability in LLMs for Medicine
item.description: CLEAR framework evaluates LLM reliability in ambiguous medical contexts

item.title: OpenMythos: A theoretical reconstruction of the Claude Mythos architecture, built from first principles using the available research literature
item.description: OpenMythos reconstructs Claude Mythos architecture from research literature

item.title: Lessons for Agentic Coding: What should we do when code is cheap?
item.description: Blog post explores lessons for agentic coding when code generation is cheap

item.title: Google DeepMind Workers Vote to Unionize Over Military AI Deals
item.description: Google DeepMind UK staff unionize to block AI use in military projects

item.title: ElevenLabs lists BlackRock, Jamie Foxx, and Eva Longoria as new investors
item.description: ElevenLabs adds BlackRock, Jamie Foxx as investors, hits $500M ARR

item.title: New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
item.description: OpenAI introduces self-serve ChatGPT ad tools

item.title: What (un)exactly do you mean by semantic search?
item.description: Stack Overflow discusses semantic search differences between Lucene and vector databases

item.title: Building for the Rising Complexity of Agentic Systems with Extreme Co-Design
item.description: NVIDIA discusses co-design approaches for complex agentic systems

item.title: Mistral Adds Remote Agents and Work Mode to Le Chat
item.description: Mistral launches 128B parameter model and cloud agent capabilities

item.title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
item.description: OpenAI partners with PwC to automate finance workflows with AI agents

item.title: US government now has pre-release access to AI models from five major labs for national security testing
item.description: US government gains pre-release access to AI models from top labs for security testing

item.title: Agent MetaSKILLs
item.description: Lobsters discussion on Agent MetaSKILLs framework

item.title: Airbyte Agents
item.description: Airbyte Agents product announcement on Product Hunt

item.title: Introducing the agent quality loop: AgentCore Optimization now in preview
item.description: AWS introduces agent quality loop for optimizing AI agents with batch testing

item.title: Inside Claude Code Auto Mode: Anthropic’s Autonomous Coding System with Human Approval Gates
item.description: Anthropic adds auto mode with safety gates to Claude Code

item.title: Why a Decade of Writing Detection Logic Makes the Mythos Exploit Numbers Less Scary
item.description: Lobsters debates writing detection logic and exploit numbers in AI

item.title: Charting the AI Perception Gap: Across 71 scenarios, AI experts (N=119) and the public (N=1100) have differing views on the risks, benefits, and value of AI. More importantly, AI experts discount the influence of risks stronger than the public does when forming their value judgments [R]
item.description: Study shows AI experts and public differ on AI risks and benefits

item.title: Enhancing Game Review Sentiment Classification on Steam Platform with Attention-Based BiLSTM
item.description: Attention-based BiLSTM improves Steam review sentiment classification

item.title: He Couldn’t Land a Job Interview. Was AI to Blame?
item.description: Medical student investigates AI's role in rejecting his job application

item.title: AI is saving pharma billions in manufacturing and back-office work, just not in the lab
item.description: AI cuts costs in pharma manufacturing but not in drug discovery
